title: Bullseye-target — crit zone on enemy castle weak point
hypothesis: A pulsing bullseye marker (3 concentric rings + center) sits on the enemy castle weak point (mid-keep). Hits within 36px of center deal 1.5x damage and spawn a gold 'CRIT!' float + radial flash. Lifts mechanic clarity (where to aim) + adds juicy combo loop.
diff_from_baseline: scene_exterior/index.js: bullseye marker drawn over enemy castle (nx=0.50, y=520), pulsing rings + dot, crit flash + radial burst on hits within 36px, 1.5x damage scaling, beefier shake/recoil on crit
playable/praise_floats.js: extended spawnPraise with kind:'crit' variant (108px gold gradient, dark-orange stroke, larger rotation jitter); added spawnCritPraise export
review_notes: Axis mechanic respected: bullseye/crit instrumentation visible (4 'crit' tokens added, +1 'CRIT' over baseline). Drag-aim-fire-impact loop preserved — only impact resolution branched with proximity check + 1.5x damage scaling and a praise variant. No new assets, +1705 bytes (canvas-drawn rings + extended praise float).
